Overview

Address
121 WALNUT BOTTOM ROAD, SHIPPENSBURG, PA 17257

Setting
Urban
3 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 3/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 4/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
Resident count too small for reliable rating.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 4/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 4/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 4/5

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2025-05-16 3 3 0 16 1 16
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2024-06-13 6 4 2 28 1 28
Total weighted health score
19.0
lower is better
Infection-control citations
0
last cycle

Deficiencies (18)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

18 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2025-05-16 2025-06-25
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. E 2025-05-16 2025-06-25
0868 Have the Quality Assessment and Assurance group have the required members and meet at least quarterly D 2025-05-16 2025-06-25
0641 Ensure each resident receives an accurate assessment. D 2024-06-13 2024-07-31
0657 Develop the complete care plan within 7 days of the comprehensive assessment; and prepared, reviewed, and revised by a team of health professionals. D 2024-06-13 2024-07-31
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2024-06-13 2024-07-31
0699 Provide care or services that was trauma informed and/or culturally competent. D 2024-06-13 2024-07-31
0607 Develop and implement policies and procedures to prevent abuse, neglect, and theft. E 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0558 Reasonably accommodate the needs and preferences of each resident. D 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. E 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0641 Ensure each resident receives an accurate assessment. E 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0657 Develop the complete care plan within 7 days of the comprehensive assessment; and prepared, reviewed, and revised by a team of health professionals. D 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. E 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0690 Provide appropriate care for residents who are continent or incontinent of bowel/bladder, appropriate catheter care, and appropriate care to prevent urinary tract infections. D 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0730 Observe each nurse aide's job performance and give regular training. E 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0759 Ensure medication error rates are not 5 percent or greater. D 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0804 Ensure food and drink is palatable, attractive, and at a safe and appetizing temperature. E 2023-08-17 2023-10-03
0658 Ensure services provided by the nursing facility meet professional standards of quality. D 2023-06-23 2023-07-21

Methodology & sources
  • Nursing Home Provider Info (nh-provider-info), vintage 2026, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 14,703 rows.
  • Nursing Home Health Deficiencies (nh-deficiencies), vintage 2026, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 418,972 rows.

  • Skilled Nursing Facility Cost Report (snf-cost-report), vintage 2023, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 14,120 rows.
